Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Airtable relocation records using airtable_list_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations) or airtable_search_records (field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Blessing Okafor") to retrieve Blessing Okafor's current assignments.
OE 2: Search Airtable relocation records to determine all coordinators' active workloads using airtable_list_records. Count In Progress moves per coordinator.
OE 3: Search emails for Okoye damage correspondence and Blessing's whereabouts using search_emails (query: "Zara Okoye" or "prototype damage" or "Blessing" or similar).
OE 4: Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics account using crm_search_companies (query: "Mosaic") or crm_search_deals.
OE 5: Search Slack for Okoye damage escalation using conversations_search_messages (query: "Okoye" or "prototype" or "damage" or similar).
OE 6: Search emails and Slack for open issues on Blessing's other active moves using search_emails and conversations_search_messages (queries per move name). Expected findings: Marcus Webb cold-chain split-vendor outstanding items; Raj Patel chain-of-custody documentation problem; Emilia Cruz Steinway piano damage claim and $1,200 insurance rider. Confirms Blessing is juggling multiple high-risk moves.
OE 7: Search Linear for any existing ticket for the Okoye damage using linear_list_issues (query: "Okoye" or "Mosaic damage" or similar). Expected finding: No dedicated Linear issue exists — agent must create one.
OE 8: Search QuickBooks for Heartland billing using quickbooks_search_bills (criteria: VendorRef "Heartland" or similar) and/or quickbooks_search_invoices.
OE 9: Update Airtable relocation records using airtable_update_records to reassign Kevin Okafor (recReloc00000000030) and Preethi Nair (recReloc00000000036) — the two standard moves without specialty handling — from Blessing Okafor to the coordinator with most capacity (Fatimah Al-Rashidi or similar). Include notes explaining the workload rebalance.
OE 10: Create an urgent Linear issue using linear_create_issue for the Zara Okoye prototype damage claim. Title referencing Okoye/Mosaic/Heartland, priority 1 (urgent), description covering $90K prototype damage, Heartland liability under work order HM-WO-04142026-OKOYE, insurance gap.
OE 11: Look up #operations Slack channel using channels_list to find channel_id C006.
OE 12: Post reassignment summary in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C006). Explains what changed (which moves were reassigned and to whom) and why (Blessing overloaded, quality incident).
OE 13: Look up Blessing Okafor's contact using contacts_search_contacts. Expected: blessing.okafor@moveops.com.
OE 14: Send message to Blessing Okafor via send_email (to blessing.okafor@moveops.com) or Slack DM. Communicates that moves were reassigned to fix a process issue, not as disciplinary action. Supportive tone.
OE 15: Look up Emeka Diallo's contact using contacts_search_contacts. Expected: emeka.diallo@moveops.com.
OE 16: Send email to Emeka Diallo using send_email (to emeka.diallo@moveops.com). Provides comprehensive rundown: Okoye damage details, newly created tracking ticket, Heartland liability context

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
